characters.name: Agro999
characters.description: TankAgro999Biographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorBlondEye ColorGreenEnemiesMajorTomTartawreckerTelevision InformationFirst AppearanceThe Thing About Bodalv•d•eAgro999is a minor character inChaotic. v•d•e Agro999's real name is Tank. He battled Tom in "The Thing about Bodal". In the first battle of the match, he chose Tangath Toborn to attack Tom's Maxxor. At first, it seemed like Tom would lose the battle easily. But after casting The Song of Resurgence, Tom/Maxxor took out Tank/Tangath Tobornwiththe Liquilizer. But Tank was still determined to take Maxxor down. He hit Tom with everything he had. Unfortunately for him, it wasn't enough. Tom/Maxxorwiped outUlfhedinn,Blazier,Staluk,Velreth, andRaimusa. But Tank/Raimusa cast the Chorus of Cothica which enabled him to cast the underworld magic called Song of Returning. He used it to revive his Tangath Toborn. This time Tank/Tangath Toborn defeated Tom/Maxxor then he beatGespedan,Ettala,Xaerv, andDractyl. But with a good combination of location and creature, Tom/Bodalmanaged to defeat Tank/Tangath Toborn.

characters.name: BattleBoarder
characters.description: DrewBattleBoarderBiographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorOrangeEye ColorGreenTelevision InformationVoice Actor(s)Tom Waylandv•d•e v•d•e Battleboarder(real nameDrew) is aChaotic Player. Drew is a skateboarding player who specializes in Overworlders first seen in the episode "Allmageddon" Everyone wanted to battle him because hisHotoncould use Allmageddon, an attack which defeated any enemy in one shot. After Tom, Kaz, and Sarah lose to him, Drew went home, promising to battle Peyton the next day. They go to Perim to find Hoton, only to find him weakened and hopelessly trying to rebuild something. They learn from Hoton's best friendVidavthat when using Allmageddon to save his village from Underworld raiders, Hoton actually destroyed it by mistake. Later, Peyton battles Battleboarder. Using one of his innovative strategies that his friends helped him set up, Peyton beat Hoton and Allmageddon, winning the match. Drew was impressed. He was also glad to have lost, stating that winning was fine, but was it was boring if he knew he would win.

characters.name: Bruiser33
characters.description: Bruisser33Biographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorBlondeEye ColorBlackv•d•eBruiser33is a chaotic player who lost toReggieOneand gave him aCastle BodhranScan.MajorTomput his Maxxor card on the line to get a Castle Bordran Scan. Tom lost the battle and his Maxxor card. Bruiser33 was so shocked that Tom was more bummed about Reggie than his Maxxor card that he gave him an extra copy of his Castle Bordran scan. v•d•e Bruiser was Tom's opponent in Castle Bodhran or Bust Part 1. This was a wager-battle in the BetaDrome. Tom and Kaz needed the Castle Bodhran scan, to help them find ReggieOne. Bruiser refused to battle Kaz, who was more experienced then Tom, since he had an UnderWorld deck. Bruiser wanted Tom's Maxxor card.

characters.name: Buzz Jr.
characters.description: Buzz Jr.Biographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorGreenTelevision InformationFirst AppearanceThe Floundering Fatherv•d•e v•d•e He is a small child with Brown hair and brown eyes.

characters.name: Buzz Sr.
characters.description: Buzz Sr.Biographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorGreenTelevision InformationFirst AppearanceThe Floundering Fatherv•d•e v•d•e Buzz Sr.is a Chaotic player, and the father ofBuzz Jr. Buzz Sr. initially comes off as quite rude, arrogant, demanding, and a sore loser, shouting orders loudly to Buzz Jr. during the latter's match withTomand throwing a fit when his son loses. He then lectures Buzz Jr. about his gameplay and dismisses Tom as a "third-rate player". However, behind his bluster, he has no actual Drome experience and shows doubt and hesitation when pressed into an actual match against Kaz, in which he loses several battles easily, which causes him to become agitated. Despite his shortcomings, however, Buzz Sr. and his son do care about each other, as his attitude softens over the course of the match as Buzz Jr. calls him after each battle, and by the end of the episode he shows signs of dropping his bossiness and overconfidence.

characters.name: ChaotiKween
characters.description: SarahChaotiKweenSeason 1Seasons 2 and 3Biographical InformationAge13-19[1]GenderFemaleHair ColorBlondEye ColorTealLoyaltyPeytonic MasterMajorTomKidChaorWammaReggieOneMezzmarrEnemiesKlayoticKrystellaTelevision InformationVoice Actor(s)Rebecca SolerFirst AppearanceWelcome to Chaotic (Part One)(background extra)Welcome to Chaotic (Part Two)(debut)v•d•e v•d•e Sarah Laurence (ChaotiKween)is one of the main protagonists of the Chaotic TV Series. Sarah is the smart, sassy female of the group who loves to speak her mind. A fearless and shrewd Chaotic player, she is the most likely to get into a fight with the boys and/or the other players. Sarah is not afraid to take on a Creature who makes her angry, so the boys sometimes have to drag her out of danger in Perim. She’s very protective of the boys and would do anything to help them. Since Sarah has a life-long interest in insects, she’s naturally drawn to the ant-like Danians.

characters.name: CodeMaster Amzen
characters.description: CodeMaster AmzenCodeMaster AmzenBiographical InformationGenderFemaleLoyaltyCodeMastersv•d•e v•d•e Due to the Amzen Drome being white and pale blue in color in season 1 while later being blue and yellow in color in later seasons, it's possible that she wears blue and yellow-colored robes or white and pale blue-colored robes. As aCodeMastershe is one of seven leaders ofChaotic. Her drome is seen in multiple episodes, likeShifting Sands,Allmageddonetc. mostly as a background filler. It is triangular, with blue patterns along the front. Out of the sides it has two large round white and blue bases and beside it is a rectangular building with a large ringed tower. InRockwave and Rollthe Amzen Drome is yellow and blue instead of white and blue. Battles in her Drome:Allmageddon-KlayoticvsBattleBoarder,Shifting Sands-SlickNickvsMajorTom,Rockwave and Roll-Eddie XvsPeytonic Master Although she has not yet appeared in the T.V. series, she has been mentioned.Kazstates inBattle Lessonthat he and Amzen fought once and he lost asChaorwhen her BattleGear changed him into a shock absorber. It has been thought that just asCrellanspecializes in new creatures, Amzen does so withBattleGear. Amzen was set to make her debut in season 4 of Chaotic along with the other six CodeMasters. However, Chaotic has been put on hold (seemingly indefinitely) due to legal trouble.

characters.name: CodeMaster Chirrul
characters.description: CodeMaster ChirrulBiographical InformationGenderMaleLoyaltyCodeMastersv•d•e v•d•e CodeMaster Chirrulis theCodeMasterof the Chirrul Drome.

characters.name: CodeMaster Crellan
characters.description: CodeMaster CrellanBiographical InformationGenderMaleLoyaltyCodemastersTelevision InformationVoice Actor(s)Marc DiraisonFirst AppearanceBattle Lessonv•d•e v•d•e CodeMaster Crellanis a character in Chaotic as well as theCodeMasterin charge of the Crellan Drome. WhenTomwas looking to get a scan ofMaxxorwhile he was taking a walk in Rock River Canyon, Crellan (in human form) lured Tom to him. He persuaded Tom to fight him in the BetaDrome, and soon revealed himself as Crellan. He encouraged Tom that he didn't need Maxxor to win, however even the CodeMaster's speech couldn't stop Tom from quitting Chaotic (temporarily) in afuture episode. Tom and Crellan face each other again in The CodeMaster ChroniclesPart 1andPart 2. Ironically, Tom defeats Crellan with the use of Maxxor, partly due to his new confidence. Crellan makes a brief appearance in "A Rare Hazard" alongsideCodeMaster Imthor. He, along with Imthor, disabled the rogue players' Scanners to take them in. InLegions of Aa'une,  Crellan contacts Kaz and asks if he has heard from Tom. Kaz tells him what happened and that Peyton and Sarah were with Tom in Kiru City. Kaz wanted to check on them but pointed out that the transport system was shut down. Crellan told Kaz that system only prevented players from porting out of Perim. Kaz was going to ask Crellan if it meant he could go back, but Crellan just told Kaz to hurry and that it may be already too late.

characters.name: CodeMaster Hotekk
characters.description: Codemaster HotekkBiographical InformationGenderMaleLoyaltyCodemastersTelevision InformationVoice Actor(s)Scottie RayFirst AppearanceWhen a Codemaster Callsv•d•e v•d•e CodeMaster Hotekkis a character in Chaotic, andCodeMasterof the Hotekk Drome. Hotekk is extremly stern and aggressive towards the players he plays against. One day CodeMaster Hotekk gave a call toPeytonto retrieve some M'arrillian scans. After Peyton had barely obtained the scans he headed to the Beta Drome to wait for the trade as instructed. Peyton noticed that he was wearing sneakers, jumped Hotekk and opened his mask, revealingTom! Tom explained thatKlaytried to fool Peyton into getting him the scans because he was too afraid of theM'arrilliansto get them himself. The real CodeMaster Hotekk later challengedTomto a match after he won seven matches in the Hotekk Drome. He gave Tom a hint, by hisMugic:Enigmatic Etude, about usingDranakis Thresholdas a portal to the past.

characters.name: Connor
characters.description: ConnerBiographical InformationGenderMaleTelevision InformationFirst AppearanceWar Beastsv•d•e v•d•e He appeared in the episodeWar Beasts. He had a scan of a War Beast namedBlazvatanand traded an extra scan for twenty cards in Peyton's Deck. After Peyton lost as Blazvatan, Connor told Peyton that the auction was not a con. He just needed a Mipedian Conjurer to control Blazvatan and whispered to Peyton that one could be found in Rao'Pa Sahkk.

characters.name: CoolTom
characters.description: CoolTomBiographical InformationAge16-18GenderMaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorHazelTelevision InformationFirst AppearanceTale of Two Tomsv•d•e v•d•e CoolTom (real name Tom) is a player who's apparently taller, cooler, and better thanMajorTomin every way. MajorTom once challenged him to a drone match betting his own friends andMaxxor. Afrer Tom defeated CoolTom in a Drome Match, Tom was told by Kaz, Peyton, and Sarah that they preferred him over CoolTom anyway. CoolTom is rather charming, able to win the friendship ofKaz,Peyton, andSarahwith great ease. However, beneath his superficial charm, he is quite self-centered and haughty and seemingly enjoys lording his apparent superiority over MajorTom, showing him up in multiple interactions with his friends. His selfishness is first hinted at when he abandons MajorTom inThe Barracksafter MajorTom gets stuck, focusing on getting anIce Cloakscan instead. CoolTom is also quite boastful, claiming with fake sympathy to MajorTom that anyone can lose 5 battles in a row, though he says it's never happened to him before. During the final battle of his match against MajorTom, he shows his true colors, smugly boasting about how he would steal Tom's friends away from him and mocking him for not being good enough to get an Ice Cloak scan.

characters.name: CounterFighter
characters.description: Rodrick RothingtonCounterFighterBiographical InformationAge40GenderMaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorBrownLoyaltyHimselfv•d•e v•d•e Rodrick Rothington, also known as CounterFighter, was a fictional character created by Peyton for a fanfiction contest. In his story, Rodrick was an international art forger whose counterfeits have earned him quite the fortune. A secret organization for peace wished to have Rothington join their cause, as his skills as a counterfeiter were apparently invaluable. However, he would only join them if he could be beaten by Peyton, who was apparently the world's greatest Chaotic Player, in a match. A member of the organization, Agent Chambers, would recruit Peyton and brief him on their mission. Together, they would arrive at Rothington's super luxury island and this is where Rothington revealed his identity as CounterFighter, a strict card-only player that was rumored to be one of the best Chaotic Players on earth. They would proceed to Counterfighter's courtyard and Peyton would have a match with him. Despite his best efforts, Peyton lost. However, Peyton revealed that all of CounterFighter's cards were indeed forgeries. A battle between the members of the peace organization and Rothington's cronies occurred, with Rothington fleeing in a helicopter and announcing that the island was set to explode. Before we could learn the conclusion to this story, Peyton's friends pointed out the flaws in his story. Rothington's character was one of deceit and charm.
characters.personality_section: Rothington's character was one of deceit and charm.

characters.name: DanianDan
characters.description: When the Drome Matches were getting uglier with theM'arrillian Tribefree, one of those opponents was DanianDan. Tom, Peyton, and Sarah see him fighting a Chaotic Player withRath'tab. He nearly defeated his opponent when using the Mindbander BattleGear, but was defeated. This however inspired Sarah and Peyton to look for the BattleGear's hiding place.

characters.name: Deenha
characters.description: Deenhais anOverWorldCreature. She resembles a blue-skinned genie . DeenhaPersonal InformationLoyaltyOverWorldBiographical InformationGenderFemaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorBluev•d•e v•d•e Deenha looks like a sweet little girl. But when it comes to a battle Deenha can defeat creatures larger, stronger, and faster than her with surprising ease. With goat's horns and body of a young girl, Deenha is an amazing OverWorld Warrior.[citation needed]

characters.name: Dyrtax
characters.description: DyrtaxCard InformationCreature - UnderWorld ScoutRarity​ CommonSetOraganized Play 1#5Courage:35(25–45)Power:60(50–70)Wisdom:45(35–55)Speed:65(55–75)Energy:45(40–50)Mugic AbilitySwift 1.Treasure hunters constantly try to steal valuable crystals at Jade Pillar. Dyrtax makes sure they don't get too greedy.Personal InformationLoyaltyUnderworldInhabitsJade PillarFavorite Location(s)Jade PillarFavorite BattlegearFlux BaubleBiographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorGreenv•d•e v•d•e Dyrtaxis anUnderWorldCreature. Dyrtax is the guardian ofJade Pillar, in that he is tasked with maintaining the security and general structure of the crystal column. When treasure hunters attempt to cut off bits of the pillar for profit, Dyrtax ensures they don't get far.

characters.name: Elliot
characters.description: ElliotBiographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorRedEye ColorGreenTelevision InformationFirst AppearanceOut in the Coldv•d•eElliotis a character on theChaoticTV Series. v•d•e WhenKazwas trying to climb Scimitar Summit by way of the Kertauk Pass in order to aidRaimusaagainst an incomingPyrithion,Tomand the others must tried to find a way to help him make it through the lethal shortcut. Unfortunately, nobody had a scan of Scimitar Summit. Elliot, however, had many so-called "quality" scans of the pass. When an attempted trade failed, a little goading from Sarah forced Elliot to battle Tom to prove his scans were all that they were cracked up to be. Tom had a team made up of capable flying creatures, since Tom needed to be able to scope out the shortcuts fast to help Kaz. Unfortunately, Elliot was more focused on winning and proving that his scans were quality than aiding Tom (evidenced by when he tricked Tom/Drakness into believing that one of the tunnels Kaz had to take led to a pit of acid ice, allowing his Ulmar to beatDrakness, and revealing at the end that both tunnels were safe.) As the match went on, Elliot began beating Tom, and eventually Elliot won, though Tom managed to find all of the safe shortcuts in time for Kaz to save Raimusa. Elliot comes off as the traditional super-arrogant nerd that everybody would like to see put in their place. He also has very little morality, as seen where he tricked Tom as Drakness, and was unwilling to trade some of his scans to help Kaz, stating he was "in the scan business, not the hero business". He also apparently does not care if someone lives or dies, as he deceived Tom as Drakness just to create "drama" for his "customers".

characters.name: FireKing
characters.description: "Hey, MajorTom!  Fetch!"- FireKing as Cerbie.FireKingBiographical InformationGenderMaleHair ColorBlondeTelevision InformationFirst AppearanceA Fearsome Fatev•d•eFireKingis a Chaotic player who debuted in the episodeA Fearsome Fate. v•d•e FireKing is a Caucasian teenager with blonde hair and a brown jacket. Unlike most Underworld players shown in the series, FireKing is shown to be honorable and a great sport, as he offered to get something to eat with Tom after defeating him. He admits he can get carried away when battling as an Underworlder and trash talk, though is capable of apologizing for this behavior.

characters.name: Formicidor
characters.description: ' FormicidorCard InformationCreature - Danian Squadleader ScoutRarity​ CommonSetDawn of Perim#58ArtistAdrian Barries and Anthony WashingtonCourage:60(50–70)Power:40(30–50)Wisdom:35(25–45)Speed:40(30–50)Energy:40(35–45)Mugic AbilityHive: Formicidor has an additional 10Courage for each Mandiblor Creature you control and each Infected Creature in play.Because he dares to roam the UnderWorld, Formicidor knows secrets even some UnderWorlders do not.Personal InformationLoyaltyDanianEnemiesNon-DaniansInhabitsUnderworldFavorite Location(s)Mount PillarFavorite BattlegearVlaric ShardBiographical InformationGenderMaleEye Colorgreenv•d•e'Formicidoris aDanianCreature. v•d•e Formicidor acquired his combat skills and his knowledge of Danian Mugic through diligent study and sheer determination. Since his initial training, Formicidor has risen to the rank of Danian Squadleader and Scout. He’s often put in charge of leading small reconnaissance squads on dangerous missions outside Danian territory. He’s renowned and respected for his outstanding Courage and his commitment to serving the Hive at any cost.
